scripts.build: pnpm build:deps && pnpm prepare:dsd && vite build
scripts.build:deps: pnpm -w build:native && pnpm --filter @iktia/core build && pnpm --filter @iktia/runtime build && pnpm --filter @iktia/motion build && pnpm --filter @iktia/compiler build && pnpm --filter @iktia/router build && pnpm --filter @iktia/vite build && pnpm --filter @iktia/primitives build
scripts.test: pnpm build:deps && pnpm prepare:dsd && playwright test
